# Third-Party Notice — puppy_control_msgs

This directory vendors the ROS 2 package `puppy_control_msgs` for the purpose of building a ROS 2 CLI environment that can publish/inspect PuppyPi custom message types (e.g., `puppy_control_msgs/msg/Velocity`).

## Upstream source
- Project: Hiwonder PuppyPi
- Branch: `ros2`
- Path: `src/driver/puppy_control_msgs`
- Upstream repository: Hiwonder/PuppyPi (GitHub)

## License
- Apache License 2.0 (as declared in `package.xml` of the upstream package)

## Modification status
- **Unmodified**: This package is vendored without changes.

## Notes
- This package is included under `third_party/` to keep the main project reproducible without requiring additional downloads at build time.
